feed.title: Google Cloud: Database Center
feed.subtitle: Changelog for Google Cloud product: Database Center

entry.content:
The Database Center REST and RPC APIs are available in Preview. The Database Center API provides access to an organization-wide, cross-product database fleet health platform. You can use the API to aggregate health, security, and compliance signals from various Google Cloud databases.

For more information, see the Database Center API reference.
entry.summary: The Database Center API, a new platform for monitoring the health, security, and compliance of your entire database fleet, is now available in preview. This API aggregates signals from various Google Cloud databases, offering an organization-wide view. Explore the API reference for more details.
entry.title: Feature: Database Center API now in Preview

entry.content:
Database Center support for Model Context Protocol (MCP) is generally available (GA). You can use the Database Center remote MCP server to connect to Database Center from AI applications such as Gemini CLI, ChatGPT, or Claude. The MCP server provides access to Database Center tools that help you review fleet health, audit inventory, and check for security issues.

For more information, see Use the Database Center remote MCP server and the Database Center MCP tools reference.
entry.summary: Database Center now fully supports the Model Context Protocol (MCP), allowing AI applications like Gemini CLI, ChatGPT, and Claude to connect. This enables easier access to tools for reviewing fleet health, auditing inventory, and checking security.
entry.title: Feature: Database Center MCP Support Now Generally Available

entry.content:
Database Center fleet insights are available in Preview. Fleet insights highlight inventory and performance insights generated by Gemini. You can use these insights to identify and understand specific issues in your database fleet.

For more information, see View the performance of your database fleet and View your fleet inventory.
entry.summary: Database Center fleet insights are now available in preview. These insights, powered by Gemini, help you understand inventory and performance across your database fleet, enabling you to identify and address specific issues.
entry.title: Feature: Fleet insights now in preview

entry.content:
Database Center dashboard reporting is available in Preview. You can configure daily, weekly, and monthly reports that summarize your fleet inventory and health.

For more information, see Create reports for your dashboard views.
entry.summary: The Database Center now offers a new dashboard reporting feature in Preview. You can configure daily, weekly, and monthly reports to summarize your fleet's inventory and health. This allows for better tracking and management of your database resources.
entry.title: Feature: New Database Reporting Available

entry.content:
Database Center can monitor BigQuery resources. The resources table shows the following for a BigQuery database:

  • Datasets for a BigQuery database. For more information, see Introduction to datasets.
  • The number of reservations, which reserve resources, to process queries.

This feature is in Preview.
entry.summary: Database Center now monitors BigQuery resources, including datasets and query reservations. This new feature is currently in Preview, offering enhanced visibility into your BigQuery usage.
entry.title: Feature: Monitor BigQuery Resources

entry.content:
Database Center lets you monitor active queries across your fleet to identify and analyze query issues, such as slow queries. This feature supports AlloyDB for PostgreSQL and Cloud SQL database products.

For more information, see View the performance of your database fleet.
entry.summary: Database Center now allows you to monitor active queries across your entire database fleet, helping you identify and analyze issues like slow queries. This new feature supports both AlloyDB for PostgreSQL and Cloud SQL. Gain deeper insights into your database performance and optimize query execution.
entry.title: Feature: Monitor active queries across your database fleet

entry.content: Monitoring the inventory, metrics, and alerts for Oracle Database@Google Cloud databases using Database Center is generally available (GA). For more information, see Supported health issues.
entry.summary: Monitor your Oracle Database@Google Cloud inventory, metrics, and alerts with Database Center. This feature is now generally available, offering enhanced visibility and management capabilities for your databases.
entry.title: Feature: Database Center now generally available

entry.content: You can use Database Center to monitor your Cloud SQL database resources for enhanced backup protection. Enhanced protection is a Backup and DR Service feature. For more information, see Use enhanced backup protection. To configure enhanced backups for Cloud SQL resources, see Enhanced backups.
entry.summary: Monitor your Cloud SQL databases with Database Center for enhanced backup protection. This feature, part of the Backup and DR Service, ensures greater data safety. Configure these enhanced backups for your Cloud SQL resources to improve your recovery capabilities.
entry.title: Feature: Database Center: Enhanced Backup Protection for Cloud SQL

entry.content: You can monitor the inventory, metrics, and alerts for Oracle Database@Google Cloud databases using Database Center. For more information, see Metrics and alerting policy filters. Oracle Database@Google Cloud support in Database Center is in Preview. During Preview, you can't monitor health issues for Oracle Database@Google Cloud databases.
entry.summary: Monitor inventory, metrics, and alerts for Oracle databases using Database Center. This feature is currently in Preview, with health issue monitoring not yet available.
entry.title: Feature: Oracle Database@Google Cloud monitoring in Database Center

entry.content: You can create alerting policies for new database resources and signals, using filters to restrict the monitored metric data. This feature lets you get detailed insights into the health of your database fleet and troubleshoot issues. You can filter data based on metric labels, such as signal type, or by resource labels, such as the resource's location or name. For more information, see Metrics and alerting policy filters.
entry.summary: Create alerting policies for new database resources and signals with filters to restrict monitored metric data, gaining detailed insights into your database fleet's health and troubleshooting issues by filtering data based on metric or resource labels.
entry.title: Feature: Database Alerting Policies

entry.content:
The following performance recommendations and insights are available in Database Center:

  • Replication lag for Bigtable.
  • Outdated client for Bigtable.
  • Connections burdening disk for Cloud SQL for SQL Server.
  • Location org policy not satisfied for Spanner.

For more information, see Supported health issues.
entry.summary: Database Center now provides performance insights for Bigtable replication lag and outdated clients, as well as Cloud SQL for SQL Server connection issues and Spanner location policy violations.
entry.title: Feature: Database performance insights now available in Database Center

entry.content: Database Center offers monitoring support for databases running on Google Compute Engine virtual machines. This feature is in Preview. To request access to this feature, visit the access request page. For more information, see Monitor databases on Compute Engine virtual machines.
entry.summary: Monitoring for databases on Compute Engine virtual machines is now available in preview.
entry.title: Feature: New Monitoring Support for GCE Databases

entry.content: Database Center supports the analyze system performance feature in the High Resource Utilization recommendation for AlloyDB for PostgreSQL. For more information, see Performance insights and recommendations.
entry.summary: Analyze system performance for AlloyDB now available.
entry.title: Feature: New Feature: AlloyDB Performance Analysis

entry.content: You can monitor the number of new Google Cloud database resources that were added to your fleet over the past 1, 7, or 30 days. For more information, see View recently added database resources.
entry.summary: Monitor new database resources added to your fleet over the past 1, 7, or 30 days.
entry.title: Changed: Monitoring new database resources

entry.content: You can enable Gemini chat at the folder level to help you learn about Google Cloud database products. To learn how to enable Gemini chat at the folder level, see Before you begin using Gemini chat.
entry.summary: Gemini chat is now available at the folder level.
entry.title: Changed: Gemini Chat Available at Folder Level
